early_fail_close_steps.1_historical_instrument_existence_regist: if the instrument/contract never existed over the signal+holding window -> asset fail-closed BEFORE any OHLC/funding acquisition
early_fail_close_steps.2_symbol_and_venue_mapping: if signal symbol cannot be deterministically mapped (esp. SPX identity, venue-native tokens) -> fail-closed before further acquisition
early_fail_close_steps.3_funding_or_borrow_availability: if neither perp funding nor spot-margin borrow existed historically -> asset fail-closed for BOTH implementations before OHLC/fees/liquidity

externally_unverified_assumptions: REQUIRES_EXTERNAL_VERIFICATION: perpetual contract existence over signal+holding window
REQUIRES_EXTERNAL_VERIFICATION: spot-margin borrow availability over signal+holding window
REQUIRES_EXTERNAL_VERIFICATION: deterministic signal->execution symbol map
feasibility_matrix.fail_closed_condition: fail-closed for an implementation if (a) the instrument/borrow never existed over the window, (b) the symbol cannot be deterministically mapped, or (c) mandatory cost/coverage evidence is absent; currently fail-closed under BOTH implementations

acquisition_plan.filename_convention: <venue>__<asset>__<category>__<start>_<end>.<ext> ; dates ISO YYYY-MM-DD; every file paired with a .sha256 sidecar; manifests list per-file sha256 + coverage; NEVER overwrites
acquisition_plan.incremental_update_procedure: extend forward in 15-day increments; append-only; each increment adds files + updates the manifest; NEVER rewrites prior files or frozen entry dates

proposed_authorization_sequence.purpose: authorize fetching only the historical instrument-existence registry + listing/delisting timestamps
authorize fetching historical funding (perp) and/or borrow availability+rate
human reviews all acquired evidence for admission

margin:availability_by_date.admission_review_requirement: separate human admission review before use
margin:availability_by_date.validation_rule: schema + monotonic timestamps + no gaps on required sessions + no dup rows + REQUIRES_EXTERNAL_VERIFICATION on any external assumption
